input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.4.2
            TITLE: if external, uninsulated heat sinks are used, they must be properly grounded to the glv

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.4.2: If external, uninsulated heat sinks are used, they must be properly grounded to the GLV
EV.6.4.2 If external, uninsulated heat sinks are used, they must be properly grounded to the GLV 
System Ground, see EV.6.7

final_answer: If external, uninsulated heat sinks are used, they must be properly grounded to the GLV System Ground, see EV.6.7
